holdings.infoBox: ISCB is an equity ETF with a total of 1543 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lumentum Holdings stock at 0.99%, BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY at 0.50%, Revolution Medicines at 0.47%, ATI Inc. at 0.42%, and Sterling Infrastructure at 0.41%.

overview.description: The iShares Morningstar Small-Cap ETF (ISCB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of US small-cap stocks. The index selects stocks from 90-99.5% of market cap that fall into Morningstar's style categorization. ISCB was launched on Jun 28, 2004 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Morningstar US Small Cap Extended Market
